option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.Rasseducation">
<activity android:name=".tugas_p3.LoginActivity" android:exported="true"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity>
<activity android:name=".tugas_p3.WelcomeActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".tugas_p2.HitungBangunActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="false" />
</application>
</manifest>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.Rasseducation">
<activity android:name=".tugas_p3.LoginActivity" android:exported="true"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity>
<activity android:name=".tugas_p3.WelcomeActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".tugas_p4.Custom2Activity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".tugas_p4.Custom1Activity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".tugas_p2.HitungBangunActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="false" />
</application>
</manifest>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/p4_background" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnBackCustom1" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:contentDescription="@string/p4_back" android:padding="6dp" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_revert" app:tint="@color/p4_text_primary" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSourceTitleCustom1" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="Focus To Do" android:textColor="@color/p4_primary" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="18dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/p4_secondary" app:cardCornerRadius="24dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="18dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="200dp" android:adjustViewBounds="true" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/jam2" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="Zona Fokus" android:textColor="@color/p4_text_primary" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:lineSpacingExtra="2dp" android:text="Halaman ini menampilkan konsep belajar terstruktur: tentukan target harian, jadwal belajar, lalu review progres agar konsisten." android:textColor="@color/p4_text_secondary" android:textSize="15sp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/p4_background" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnBackCustom1" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:contentDescription="@string/p4_back" android:padding="6dp" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_revert" app:tint="@color/p4_text_primary" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSourceTitleCustom1" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="Focus To Do" android:textColor="@color/p4_primary" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSourceDescCustom1" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="Deskripsi dari halaman utama" android:textColor="@color/p4_text_secondary" android:textSize="14sp" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="18dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/p4_secondary" app:cardCornerRadius="24dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="18dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="200dp" android:adjustViewBounds="true" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/jam2" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="Zona Fokus" android:textColor="@color/p4_text_primary" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:lineSpacingExtra="2dp" android:text="Halaman ini menampilkan konsep belajar terstruktur: tentukan target harian, jadwal belajar, lalu review progres agar konsisten." android:textColor="@color/p4_text_secondary" android:textSize="15sp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/p4_background" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnBackCustom2" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:contentDescription="@string/p4_back" android:padding="6dp" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_revert" app:tint="@color/p4_text_primary" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSourceTitleCustom2" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="Motivasi dan Inspirasi" android:textColor="@color/p4_primary" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSourceDescCustom2" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="Deskripsi dari halaman utama" android:textColor="@color/p4_text_secondary" android:textSize="14sp" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="18dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/p4_secondary" app:cardCornerRadius="24dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="18dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="200dp" android:adjustViewBounds="true" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/image" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="Inspirasi Belajar" android:textColor="@color/p4_on_secondary" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:lineSpacingExtra="2dp" android:text="Belajar efektif butuh semangat, ritme yang pas, dan lingkungan yang nyaman. Fokus pada proses kecil setiap hari untuk hasil besar." android:textColor="@color/p4_on_secondary" android:textSize="15sp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#EEF2F7" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp">
<!-- ================= HOME / MENU UTAMA ================= --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutMenu" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:visibility="visible">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-black" android:text="Hitung Bangun Ruang" android:textColor="#2D3436" android:textSize="32sp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="Pilih bangun yang ingin kamu hitung hari ini." android:textColor="#636E72" android:textSize="16sp" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/cardMenuPersegi" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" app:cardCornerRadius="20dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="#2ECC71" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Persegi Panjang" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Hitung luas dengan panjang dan lebar" android:textColor="#E0F7FA" android:textSize="14sp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMenuPersegi" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.UnelevatedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="Mulai Hitung" android:textColor="#2ECC71" app:backgroundTint="#FFFFFF" app:cornerRadius="10dp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/cardMenuTabung" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:cardCornerRadius="20dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="#3498DB" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Tabung" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Hitung volume dengan jari-jari dan tinggi" android:textColor="#E1F5FE" android:textSize="14sp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMenuTabung" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.UnelevatedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="Mulai Hitung" android:textColor="#3498DB" app:backgroundTint="#FFFFFF" app:cornerRadius="10dp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- ================= HALAMAN PERSEGI PANJANG ================= --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutPersegi" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:visibility="gone">
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnBackPersegi" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_revert" app:tint="#2D3436" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:cardCornerRadius="24dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeColor="#DCDDE1" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Luas Persegi Panjang" android:textColor="#2ECC71" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:hint="Panjang (cm)" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="12dp" app:boxStrokeColor="#2ECC71" app:hintTextColor="#2ECC71">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etPanjang" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="numberDecimal" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:hint="Lebar (cm)" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="12dp" app:boxStrokeColor="#2ECC71" app:hintTextColor="#2ECC71">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etLebar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="numberDecimal" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnHitungLuas" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:text="HITUNG" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#2ECC71" app:cornerRadius="12dp" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="#F1F9F5" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvHasilLuas" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:padding="16dp" android:text="Hasil akan muncul di sini" android:textColor="#27AE60" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> </LinearLayout>
<!-- ================= HALAMAN TABUNG ================= --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutTabung" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:visibility="gone">
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnBackTabung" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_revert" app:tint="#2D3436" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:cardCornerRadius="24dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeColor="#DCDDE1" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Volume Tabung" android:textColor="#3498DB" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:hint="Jari-jari (r)" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="12dp" app:boxStrokeColor="#3498DB" app:hintTextColor="#3498DB">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etJari" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="numberDecimal" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:hint="Tinggi (t)" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="12dp" app:boxStrokeColor="#3498DB" app:hintTextColor="#3498DB">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etTinggi" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="numberDecimal" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnHitungVolume" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:text="HITUNG" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#3498DB" app:cornerRadius="12dp" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="#EAF2F8" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvHasilVolume" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:padding="16dp" android:text="Hasil akan muncul di sini" android:textColor="#2980B9" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#EEF2F7" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp">
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnBackBangunMain" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:contentDescription="@string/p4_back" android:padding="6dp" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_revert" app:tint="@color/p4_text_primary" />
<!-- ================= HOME / MENU UTAMA ================= --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutMenu" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:visibility="visible">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSourceTitleBangun" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Judul dari halaman utama" android:textColor="@color/p4_primary" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSourceDescBangun" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="Deskripsi dari halaman utama" android:textColor="@color/p4_text_secondary" android:textSize="14sp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-black" android:text="Hitung Bangun Ruang" android:textColor="#2D3436" android:textSize="32sp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="Pilih bangun yang ingin kamu hitung hari ini." android:textColor="#636E72" android:textSize="16sp" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/cardMenuPersegi" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" app:cardCornerRadius="20dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="#2ECC71" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Persegi Panjang" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Hitung luas dengan panjang dan lebar" android:textColor="#E0F7FA" android:textSize="14sp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMenuPersegi" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.UnelevatedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="Mulai Hitung" android:textColor="#2ECC71" app:backgroundTint="#FFFFFF" app:cornerRadius="10dp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/cardMenuTabung" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:cardCornerRadius="20dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="#3498DB" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Tabung" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Hitung volume dengan jari-jari dan tinggi" android:textColor="#E1F5FE" android:textSize="14sp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMenuTabung" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.UnelevatedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="Mulai Hitung" android:textColor="#3498DB" app:backgroundTint="#FFFFFF" app:cornerRadius="10dp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- ================= HALAMAN PERSEGI PANJANG ================= --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutPersegi" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:visibility="gone">
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnBackPersegi" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_revert" app:tint="#2D3436" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:cardCornerRadius="24dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeColor="#DCDDE1" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Luas Persegi Panjang" android:textColor="#2ECC71" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:hint="Panjang (cm)" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="12dp" app:boxStrokeColor="#2ECC71" app:hintTextColor="#2ECC71">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etPanjang" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="numberDecimal" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:hint="Lebar (cm)" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="12dp" app:boxStrokeColor="#2ECC71" app:hintTextColor="#2ECC71">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etLebar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="numberDecimal" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnHitungLuas" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:text="HITUNG" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#2ECC71" app:cornerRadius="12dp" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="#F1F9F5" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvHasilLuas" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:padding="16dp" android:text="Hasil akan muncul di sini" android:textColor="#27AE60" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> </LinearLayout>
<!-- ================= HALAMAN TABUNG ================= --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutTabung" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:visibility="gone">
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnBackTabung" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_revert" app:tint="#2D3436" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:cardCornerRadius="24dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeColor="#DCDDE1" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Volume Tabung" android:textColor="#3498DB" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:hint="Jari-jari (r)" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="12dp" app:boxStrokeColor="#3498DB" app:hintTextColor="#3498DB">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etJari" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="numberDecimal" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:hint="Tinggi (t)" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="12dp" app:boxStrokeColor="#3498DB" app:hintTextColor="#3498DB">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etTinggi" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="numberDecimal" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnHitungVolume" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:text="HITUNG" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#3498DB" app:cornerRadius="12dp" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="#EAF2F8" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvHasilVolume" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:padding="16dp" android:text="Hasil akan muncul di sini" android:textColor="#2980B9" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" tools:context=".MainActivity">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Hello World!" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" tools:context=".MainActivity">
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnBackMainPage" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:contentDescription="@string/p4_back" android:padding="6dp" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_revert" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:tint="@color/p4_text_primary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Hello World!" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <color name="black">#FF000000</color> <color name="white">#FFFFFFFF</color> <color name="mint_primary">#5CD1B3</color> <color name="mint_light">#B2E7D8</color> <color name="text_dark">#1A1A1A</color> <color name="bg_gray">#F5F5F5</color> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <color name="black">#FF000000</color> <color name="white">#FFFFFFFF</color>
<!-- Legacy colors used in previous assignments --> <color name="mint_primary">#63CDBF</color> <color name="mint_light">#D9F3EE</color> <color name="text_dark">#2E2F3A</color> <color name="bg_gray">#ECECEE</color>
<!-- P4 palette --> <color name="p4_primary">#63CDBF</color> <color name="p4_on_primary">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="p4_secondary">#CFF1EB</color> <color name="p4_on_secondary">#2E6F67</color> <color name="p4_tertiary">#E7F7F4</color> <color name="p4_on_tertiary">#2A5550</color> <color name="p4_background">#ECECEE</color> <color name="p4_surface">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="p4_border">#D5DFDD</color> <color name="p4_text_primary">#2F3140</color> <color name="p4_text_secondary">#6D7284</color> <color name="p4_error">#E45B5B</color> <color name="p4_on_error">#FFFFFF</color> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">rass-education</string> <string name="p4_home_title">Welcome Farrassurya!</string> <string name="p4_home_description">Pilih menu favoritmu untuk belajar hari ini.</string> <string name="p4_logout_title">Konfirmasi Logout</string> <string name="p4_logout_message">Apakah kamu yakin ingin logout dari akun ini?</string> <string name="p4_logout_yes">Iya, logout</string> <string name="p4_logout_no">Batal</string> <string name="p4_logout_cancelled">Logout dibatalkan</string> <string name="p4_login_success">Berhasil Login</string> <string name="p4_back">Kembali</string> </resources>
